label: Synthetic longitudinal weighted comparison with explicit downgrade path
sample_frame: Synthetic urban renters observed before and after an exposure transition.
assignment_or_exposure_mechanism: Exposure is generated by a fixture process with measured and latent common causes included for test scenarios.
comparator_construction: Predeclared overlap-restricted weighting using observed pre-exposure covariates.
identification_assumptions: Conditional exchangeability in the passing scenario
Positivity within the declared overlap region
kill_conditions: Critical unmeasured-confounding scenario flag is active
